topic: x2g Instance Family Performance and Characteristics

  entities:
  
    x2g family|Product
    r5 family|Product
    r6g family|Product
    Graviton2|Product
    x2g instances|Product
    r5 instance types|Product
    r6g instance types|Product

  proposition: The x2g family is a family of instance types.
    
    entity-entity relationships:
    
    entity-attributes:
    x2g family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types

  proposition: Some graph use cases see better performance when instances have larger buffer-pool caches.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:

  proposition: The x2g family was launched to better support graph use cases that see better performance when instances have larger buffer-pool caches.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g family|PURPOSE|better support graph use cases that see better performance when instances have larger buffer-pool caches

  proposition: The x2g family has a larger memory-to-vCPU ratio than the r5 family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g family|COMPARED_TO|r5 family
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g family|HAS_CHARACTERISTIC|larger memory-to-vCPU ratio than the r5 family

  proposition: The x2g family has a larger memory-to-vCPU ratio than the r6g family.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g family|COMPARED_TO|r6g family
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g family|HAS_CHARACTERISTIC|larger memory-to-vCPU ratio than the r6g family

  proposition: The r5 is a family of instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r5 family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types

  proposition: The r6g is a family of instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    r6g family|IS_TYPE_OF|family of instance types

  proposition: The x2g instances use the Graviton2 processor.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g instances|USES|Graviton2
  
    entity-attributes:

  proposition: The Graviton2 is a processor.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    Graviton2|IS_TYPE_OF|processor

  proposition: The x2g instances have many of the same performance characteristics as r6g instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g instances|SIMILAR_TO|r6g instance types
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g instances|HAS_CHARACTERISTIC|many of the same performance characteristics as r6g instance types

  proposition: The x2g instances have a larger buffer-pool cache than r6g instance types.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g instances|COMPARED_TO|r6g instance types
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g instances|HAS_CHARACTERISTIC|larger buffer-pool cache than r6g instance types

  proposition: Users can try using the x2g family instead if they are using r5 instance types with low CPU utilization and a high buffer-pool cache miss rate.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g family|ALTERNATIVE_TO|r5 instance types
  
    entity-attributes:

  proposition: Users can try using the x2g family instead if they are using r6g instance types with low CPU utilization and a high buffer-pool cache miss rate.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
    x2g family|ALTERNATIVE_TO|r6g instance types
  
    entity-attributes:

  proposition: Using the x2g family provides additional memory without paying for more CPU capacity.
  
    entity-entity relationships:
  
    entity-attributes:
    x2g family|PROVIDES|additional memory without paying for more CPU capacity
